tool.name: Zip collections

param.name: input_forward
param.label: Input 1
param.help: Example: dataset or collection containing forward read(s)

param.name: input_reverse
param.label: Input 2
param.help: Example: dataset or collection containing reverse read(s)

tool.help:
======== Synopsis ========
Combines two datasets into a single paired collection (forward + reverse).
=========== Description ===========
This tool takes two individual datasets and packages them into a ``paired`` collection, labeling the first as **forward** and the second as **reverse**.
This is the inverse of **Unzip collection**, which splits a pair back into two separate datasets.
======== Examples ========
**Zip two datasets into a pair**
Inputs::
Input 1 (forward): reads_R1.fastq Input 2 (reverse): reads_R2.fastq
Output ``paired`` collection::
Paired: "reads (zipped)"
forward → reads_R1.fastq reverse → reads_R2.fastq
-------
.. image:: ${static_path}/images/tools/collection_ops/zip.svg :alt: Zip two datasets into a paired collection :width: 500
-------
.. class:: infomark
@QUOTA_USAGE_NOTE@
